hotel_name: DoubleTree Resort by Hilton Paradise Valley - Scottsdale

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text: Awful stay; it was so awful we couldn't help but laugh
reviews.response: We are sorry to hear your stay with us did not meet your expectation. If you would like to discuss further, please do not hesitate to call the main line and as for a Manager on Duty. We would be more that happy to discuss.

reviews.title: Overpriced for what it is
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Not clean. Go my name wrong. Pool had no towels. Pool bar had horrible drinks and broken drafts. Worst hotel in Scottsdale.

reviews.title: Cockroach
reviews.text: I don't know about anything else, but there was an enormous cockroach lying in the shower booth. It seemed like it would fly away any moment while it was struggling. It was truly an enormous size and an incredible shock. They did change my room, but the shock hasn't faded.
reviews.response: So sorry about the bug issue. This is not common here.  We do truly apologize. We know there is a lot of places to stay when traveling.  We appreciate that you chose The Doubletree Scottsdale. Please come visit us again soon.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING BED WITH PATIO OR BALCONY

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Heavy construction and no warning until after I was checked in and woken up by loudest noise! Deceitful treatment of their honors members!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Like other Hilton resorts, clean, but dated, VERY UNCOMFORTABLE BEDS, patched up room things like door latches, painted over walls , and water bubbles in the bathrooms, not to mention not even a plastic clothes bag. That's three Hilton stays in a row,  where I've been REALLY DISAPPOINTED.
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds with Patio or Balcony

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The lobby was beautiful the staff was excellent
reviews.negatives: The room bed bugs we have to leave we only stay for 2 hours and we left , the sheets of the bed was  stiff and uncomfortable and all of our body was itching

reviews.title: No heat unless requested
reviews.text:
NYE event at this property and surprise!!
There is NO heat to the room UNLESS you contact the front desk to have maintenance come out to get into the ceiling to hook it up...seriously.
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds with Patio or Balcony

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: wouldnt get back to me about canceling my appointment

reviews.title: Unkept rooms
reviews.text: Unfortunately there were dead crickets in the room, and water stains and mold in the shower. We got moved from a poolside room to a room to one in a corner upon checkin.  The staff was friendly though at the pool bar.
reviews.response: So sorry we fell a bit short on the first room.  So happy we were able to turn it around a bit.  We know there are a lot of choices to stay here in Scottsdale, We are so happy you choose us.
reviews.room_type: 2 Qns Poolside Patio Mobility Access Ri Shwr

reviews.title: I did not stay here I checked out and requested a refund the same night and they to told me because I went through a thi
reviews.positives: I didn’t get a chance to like anything due to both rooms given to me had dirty sheets
reviews.negatives: The lack of cleanliness from the bathroom to the sheets

reviews.title: It's fine
reviews.text: The staff was disinterested and felt like they were trying to upsell us. Also, no room service after 4PM is weird and no robes in the rooms are weird as well. The rooms feel updated but for some reason they didn't update the tubs? It's like a really nice motel.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing to stay at the DoubleTree Resort Paradise Valley Scottsdale. Thank you for your feedback, it has been forwarded to the appropriate department head for discussion. Room service is open daily from 7am -10pm; we are sorry to hear that was not the case during your visit. We will make sure to address it. We do hope to host you again in the future.
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds with Patio or Balcony

reviews.title: The inside of our room was dirty. I got a text message from someone asking how my stay was going I told them the problem
reviews.positives: Does not look like a resort
reviews.negatives: Dirty

reviews.title: Quick Getaway
reviews.text:
Older property but still a nice place. Not a lot going on, it depends what you are looking for. Bar staff was pleasant, checking staff was pleasant. 
Would stay here again!
We did have 2 situations but were resolved. Our room still had maintenance in it when we arrived, so it was 15 minutes of confusion and awkwardness. But it was resolved. They charged my card that I reserved the room with and the one I gave them at check in, that was resolved after a few days.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing to stay at the DoubleTree Resort Paradise Valley Scottsdale. We are happy to hear your concerns were taken care of in a timely manner. We appreciate all your feedback and do hope to host you again in the future.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING W/ PATIO OR BALCONY COURTYARD VIEW

reviews.title: Horrible and I will not do this ever again!   Staff is very unconcerned with travelers!
reviews.positives: We had a comfortable bed and running water -  Hot & cold
reviews.negatives: Just no bath soap.   No shampoo.  Upon arrival- could not get checkin for and hour at 3 am.  On Thanksgiving day!   Could not get clean towels…. Took 3 people to get towels

reviews.title: The service was good.
reviews.text: I was unable to return from Fashion Square, but when I contacted them, I was grateful that they happily came to pick me up with a shuttle bus. The staff at the front desk were very kind and pleasant.
reviews.response:
Thank you so much for your kind words and positive feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our service and that our shuttle team was able to assist you when needed. Providing friendly and accommodating service is always our priority, and it's wonderful to know that our front desk staff left a pleasant impression.

We hope to welcome you back soon for another great experience! If there's anything more we can do to make your stay even better, please don't hesitate to let us know.
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds with Patio or Balcony

reviews.title: Will choose different hotel
reviews.positives: Hotel grounds were bad, brushes hedges uncut, front door to room, barely could clothes, chip paints hallways
reviews.negatives: Terrible front desk customer service

reviews.title: They need more staff
reviews.text:
Bed- super comfy
Food - very good
Housekeeping - It was good when they came but on a few days nobody gave us new towels, toiletries, made the bed, etc... It was not because we were in the room & my friends had same issue.
reviews.response: So sorry we had a housekeeping miss.  I am very happy to hear you enjoyed the comfort of the bed. With a lot of choices of places to stay I thrilled you choose The Doubletree Scottsdale Paradise Valley.  Please come back and see us again soon.  Jeff-Director of Resort Operations
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds with Patio or Balcony

reviews.title: I didn’t they didn’t cancel my reservation and booking.com is a scam and stole my money.
reviews.positives: I didn’t they didn’t cancel my reservation and booking.com is a scam and stole my money.

reviews.title: a little run down
reviews.text: The staff is lovely, check in and out. The beds were comfy and the shower was hot with great pressure. The vanity and the cabinet in the bedroom were well worn and damaged. Easy fixes that a resort should maintain. The coffered ceiling in the bedroom and the balconies are lovely. We were just a one night stay with more interest in our family in town than the hotel, so we didn't really see much of the facility that we couldn't see at check in or from our balcony. Would consider staying again, but it is not what I would consider luxury, more of a convention style hotel.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing to stay at the DoubleTree Resort Paradise Valley Scottsdale. We are happy to hear you had a great time. We appreciate your feedback and will forward it to the appropriate department heads for review. We do hope top host you again in the future.
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds W Patio/Balcony Courtyard View

reviews.title: I would not recommend or come back. As a Hilton honors member I would not recommend this hotel to anyone.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Staff was rude at front desk, there were 2 huge roaches running around in the women’s locker room and even though I am a hiltons honors member, they would not allow me to pay extra to have late Check out. Manager said no expectations check out at 11 am. At 10;40 housekeeping comes to door to see if we have left yet. Over all staff super rude and I did not get a manager for the roaches because the front desk staff was busy but I do have a video showing the roaches in the locker room.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Staff was friendly and hotel facilities were great. My room was nice and large and bed linens were of high quality.  I found the property’s layout confusing and very disorienting to navigate. The pools were crowded and there were not many sun chairs available.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing to stay at the DoubleTree Resort Paradise Valley Scottsdale. We are happy to hear you had a great time. We appreciate the high score and kind words. We hope to host you again in the future.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING BED WITH PATIO OR BALCONY

reviews.title: Perfect Stay
reviews.text: We visited Scottsdale for spring break and thoroughly enjoyed this resort. The pools were large enough to accommodate most. The rooms are large and spacious, the workout room is perfect. Will definitely be returning!
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing to stay at the DoubleTree Resort Paradise Valley Scottsdale. We are happy to hear you had a great time. We appreciate the high score and kind words. We hope to host you again in the future.

reviews.title: Great property - claim your pool chairs early
reviews.text: Had a great stay. Wonderful location and close to Old Scottsdale/Fashion Square. However, had to get to the pool by 6am to get a pool chair at the main pool.
reviews.room_type: 1 KING W/ PATIO OR BALCONY COURTYARD VIEW

reviews.title: Stay here if you like Air BnB’s. Do not stay here if you want a hotel experience
reviews.positives: Decent location, nice front lobby. Laundry service was decent but pricey. I did get room service breakfast which was good but after seeing the bill was some unnecessary fees on there like a $10 room service fee, especially on top of a generous tip I left (almost 50%) Employees were also friendly for the most part.
reviews.negatives: Valet was never available during my 4 night stay. I was maybe able to valet ONE time with the bellhop. Two times one of the front desk employees valet my car. One of those time when I wanted to head out the front desk clerk just gave me my keys and I had to go into the blocked off valet area to grab my own vehicle. This was not at late hours, I was trying to valet usually from 10AM to 5PM. Very disappointed in the hotel offering valet but could never actually follow through with using it. Especially for close to $400 a night. Housekeeping did not do daily walkthroughs. After my first night I called the front desk 5 TIMES each time the employee saying housekeeping will come through. On my second night again housekeeping did not come through. After calling and asking again they finally sent someone to just drop off towels and take trash. Thats it, this was also at 7pm on my 3rd night. Housekeeping did finally come through on my 4th night and made the bed, cleaned, new towels, etc, but I was checking out the early morning after. I would not recommend anyone to stay here especially for almost $400 a night for a mildly decent room. I’ve stayed in way cheaper hotels with much better service. Come to think of it this might be the first and only time I’ve stayed at a Hilton hotel. I originally had a second reservation to come back the following week for another 5 nights, I’ve cancelled that reservation now and I am going back to a Marriott based hotel.

reviews.title: Weekend trip
reviews.text: Hotel is very nice & the rooms are very spacious!
reviews.response:
So great to meet you.  Thank you for enjoying your "Staycation" we us here in Scottsdale.   Please come visit us again soon.

reviews.title: Great hotel to stay in Scottsdale
reviews.text: Our first time visit to Phoenix we decided to stay in Scottsdale area. Check in process was smooth, as usual the complimentary warm cookies. Free bottled water too. The room is spacious with 2 double queen beds. Complimentary parking is a plus. The courtyard garden has many lemon trees. Scottsdale Fashion Square is around 5 minutes by car. I highly recommend this hotel. Thanks for the hospitality.
reviews.response: Thank you for choosing to stay with us during your first visit to Phoenix! We're thrilled to hear that you had a smooth check-in experience and enjoyed our warm cookies, complimentary bottled water, and spacious accommodations. It’s great that you appreciated our beautiful courtyard and convenient location near Scottsdale Fashion Square. We truly appreciate your recommendation and kind words. We hope to welcome you back for another wonderful stay in the future! Safe travels! 😊🍋
reviews.room_type: 2 Queen Beds with Patio or Balcony

reviews.title: Too much money for a 1 star room
reviews.positives: The staff was very helpful when I had an issue with the first room. The location is good and central for Scottsdale activities.
reviews.negatives: I feel like since I booked through Booking.com I was given an extreme budget room. The first room smelled like cigarettes covered by fragrance. I asked for another room and was given one. The second room had stains on the ground, couch and chair. The bathroom was dirty with visible gunk around the shower. The bed had a large indent on one side. There was water damage on the TV stand. In the middle of the night, the TV turned on with a Welcome note. I turned it off and 20 mins later, it turned back on. I had to unplug to make sure it didn't happen again.

reviews.negatives: The rooms are poorly set. Trash cans on the counter instead of in its place. Really big stain on the floor, sheets has stains. Borders of floors were dirty, and my view of the courtyard was okay. I ordered from the restaurant and there was hair in my food. The deposit for damages was collected by the hotel and booking.com. This was not in the disclosures, and an additional fee was charged to my card from the hotel that they have no record of. Now I’m disputing that with my bank. This was not the best place to spend my money on a staycation. They make a lot of money off of our business, the rooms need to reflect that.

reviews.negatives: Property was under a major renovation and would have never booked had we knew this at time of reserving. too spread out and too much walking for older person. First night the walkway to my room was not lite and a person with a flashlight assisted me to my room. I asked the best to move to another room closer so less walking to restaurant and lobby but she replied my type was not near the office. I said then what do you have and she replied, I reminded her of her grandma??????

reviews.positives: We didn’t get to enjoy it as our stay was basically to sleep and then leave.
reviews.negatives: Our room had a bad smell upon arrival.

reviews.title: Hotel is neglected and in desperate need of TLC.
reviews.positives: I enjoyed hearing the birds outside our balcony.
reviews.negatives:
My first vacation in years, and I was so looking forward to this stay. Sadly, our room was such a disappointment, as was a lot of the property. In our room, the A/C wasn't working (had to get someone to repair it), stains on the carpet and upholstered furniture, peeling paint, broken refrigerator leg (so it fell over every time we opened it) AND our food froze (engineer fixed that, too), flickering light in shower, and slow running bathroom sink. The facilities weren't swept once during our stay (four nights), so leaves and debris just stayed put, which showed the lack of care the management has towards putting the hotel's best foot forward. Handrails and stonework were broken here and there, and even the rope hammock was "repaired" in two places, leaving gaping holes (and the other hammock stand didn't even have a hammock). We visited the pool twice, and both times, there were no towels, and no one had been to clean up the old towels, leaving the impression that every spot was taken. Only one working jet in the jacuzzi at the smaller pool (by our room). Both steam rooms at the gym were broken. And lastly (and sadly) the tree outside our balcony is dying. While other plants were watered daily, this poor tree was never watered (other by me).

This is actually a lovely property, and it's sad that Hilton doesn't care about it or their customers enough to keep the hotel and grounds in better shape. I see other reviews that are glowing, I guess we were in the neglected part of the hotel : (

If you choose to stay, be sure to ask for a nice, functioning room.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Friendly check in, lots of amenities for kids.
reviews.negatives: Woke up at 5 to get started and shower and no shower curtain or hair dryer.  Place is very dated.  Not worth the value for wait we paid per night which was over 400 for double queen room.

reviews.title: Unsatisfying
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: AC was broken, shower never got hot, water leaked from shower into hallway, toilet seat was broken, beds were too soft, and zero accommodation for late checkout

reviews.title: Luckily we were exploring most of our trip and only went to the room to sleep and change.
reviews.positives: The property looked really nice in photos. However the room we received was not up to par. The first room was facing the parking lot which is such a bad experience given the inner courts were nicer. Not sure why that’s even an option.
reviews.negatives: Rooms face the parking lot. The bed and pillows were not comfortable. The room we received smelt like sewer!

reviews.title: decent but will not stay again.
reviews.positives: Room
reviews.negatives: The service people at the Restaurant were very polite, but they will just stare at me and make me feel uncomfortable while I was eating. The towels at the Azure Pool where always empty I had to go ask for them at the lobby all wet.

reviews.title: OK - I know it’s an old property but Hilton needs to step it up  and make some updates!
reviews.positives:
Great property
Super dated - time to update rooms!
reviews.negatives:
Not super clean
Rooms need to be updated! 
 Little things - light bulbs out, no cups or coffee

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Smelled of mildew. Nothing special about the room, not worth  $300

reviews.title: Isolated in a large location.
reviews.positives: NA
reviews.negatives: Nobody around to help answer questions for a very large property that is confusing with its twist and turns in the hallways. Somebody thought it would be a good idea to make the path a puzzle to get to the rooms.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.positives: Bed was very comfortable and room was large and clean.  Good location
reviews.negatives: Parking is difficult unless you drive a smart car. Shower was definitely disappointing. And the room was large but it had a weird layout for the tv and don’t even get me started on the tv. For a second I thought I booked a hotel in the 1980s. It’s a large tv but I was hoping we could watch something like Netflix on it. Nope you gotta watch tv channels like my great great grandmother would.

reviews.title: The stay did not meet our expectations
reviews.positives: Clean and spacious room
reviews.negatives: Parking was not convenient. We lost electricity for over four hours in our room we were disappointed that the property would not have back up plans in place to prevent such discomfort for their guests

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
the room was not clean 

they let me pay for view and there was no view only trees and walls
i will not repeat the stay in this hotel
i will not recommend for any
